data.body: S2c code gaps FIXED (follow-up change on 1ccf, commit 716891026): partial-land now emits AUTOLANDER_ERROR + metric + hand_back before raising; close_ticket defaults to concrete close_ticket_via_rebar (import rebar annotate). Verified via REBAR_GATE_REF=HEAD + --ref HEAD: S2c now FAILs on ONLY the live-E2E criterion (2 code gaps resolved). --ref HEAD workflow CONFIRMED working. Remaining S2a/S2c gap = live E2E (real land through deployed bot, post-S5). Pushed S2c-fix for review. Next: build S3 (failure.py) via held-out TDD, closing against HEAD.
